name: Kekstorte (German Cookie Cake)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the egg, sugar, and vanilla until foamy.
2. Melt the coconut fat and let it cool slightly. Add the egg mixture and stir well.
3. Line a bread tin completely with wax paper, up to the top edge.
4. Place one layer of cookies in the tin, cutting some for the ends.
5. Spread half a layer of cocoa cream, then the cookies, and continue until all is gone, ending with the cream.
6. Refrigerate overnight and decorate before serving.
7. Serve thin slices; this is very rich!
